title: Juzepczukia roxburghii
intro: There is not enough information available about Juzepczukia roxburghii.
taxonomy: Juzepczukia roxburghii is classified within the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the order Ebenales and is a member of the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification places it in the genus Juzepczukia, which is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains one species. Within the family Sapotaceae, Juzepczukia roxburghii is part of the tribe Mimusopeae. This comprehensive classification helps to identify and understand the unique characteristics of Juzepczukia roxburghii within the plant kingdom.
properties: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information about Juzepczukia roxburghii's therapeutic properties.
